filtersOrSort: matched from watchAllDebts() where debt.id == payment.debtId; DebtView composite (debt + customer + paidAmount)
carried on the matched DebtView (debt.customer); rendered as receipt 'Customer' row
watchPayments(payment.debtId); client sums payments with createdAt <= this payment.createdAt to compute 'Remaining balance' after this payment (debt.amount - cumulativePaid, clamped 0..amount)
watchBusiness() (single-row profile); businessName falls back to literal 'OweMe' when absent

notes: Read-only receipt/print-confirmation view; no mutations. Composes the single Payment row with its Debt+Customer (DebtView), the debt's payment history (for remaining balance), and the business name.

Payment fetch is the ONE direct drift query in the app: AppServices.instance.db.select(payments)..where(id == paymentId).getSingleOrNull() (receipt_screen.dart ~35-37) — a Future (one-shot), not a stream. It is still a data-layer read; backend contract = fetch a single Payment by id (e.g. GET /payments/:id) returning the payment plus enough of its debt/customer/business to render a receipt.
watchAllDebts / watchPayments / watchBusiness are live drift streams (StreamBuilder) -> special.realtime=true.

Receipt number: Payment.reference IS the receipt/reference field (drift comment: 'receipt number, e.g. OWM-00418'), rendered mono in the 'Reference' row. Receipt numbering is traditional software per product-truths (never AI); the field already exists on Payment as `reference` — no separate number field needed.
Money (amount / remaining) is target integer kobo per Supersede S-1 (as-built whole-naira). IDs are target UUIDv7 strings per S-2 (as-built int autoincrement).

share/print/download are client-side STUB snackbars, NOT backend endpoints: 'Share on WhatsApp' (messaging layer), 'Download' (PDF export / file layer), 'Print' ('coming soon'). Flagged as special.downloads=true (printable/export are unmetered & free per conventions), not as API actions.
'Paid via <method>' footer + method icon are pure presentation over Payment.method.

uiStatesHandled: loading = SizedBox.shrink while the payment Future is not yet done; empty = EmptyState 'Receipt not found' when the payment id resolves to null (may have been removed); loaded = full receipt card. Remaining balance shows '—' when the parent debt cannot be found.
